informationCards.title: Prepare Your Donation
informationCards.subtitle: Everything you need to know to perform this act of love safely and confidently.

requirements.title: Requirements
requirements.description: Be between 16 and 69 years old, weigh more than 50 kg, and be well rested. Check the full list of temporary restrictions.

appointment.title: Appointment
appointment.description: Avoid queues and crowds. Choose the best time at your preferred blood center through our integrated platform.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: If you have any questions about the donation process, you can contact us through the following channels.

footer.title: Vida em Rede
footer.description: A platform dedicated to saving lives by connecting generous hearts with those who need blood the most.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Vida em Rede. All rights reserved. Made with love by donors for donors.

hero.title: Our Mission is to Save Lives
hero.subtitle: Connecting donors with hematology centers to ensure no one waits for hope.

history.title: Our History and Purpose
history.description1: Vida em Rede was born from the urgent need to modernize blood donation in Brazil. In a scenario where blood shortages are recurrent, we realized that technology could be the fundamental bridge.
history.description2: We act as a digital facilitator between those who want to donate and the institutions that need vital supplies. Our focus is to optimize the flow of donations through precise data, agile communication, and, above all, empathy.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: Clear processes and real-time information about blood stock levels at each unit.

humanity.title: Humanity
humanity.description: We put people at the center of everything, treating each donor and recipient with the respect and care they deserve.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We use cutting-edge technology to predict demands and facilitate intelligent donation scheduling.

howtWorks.title: How It Works
howtWorks.button: I Want to Be a Donor Now

hero.title: Who Can Donate Blood?
hero.description: Your donation can save up to four lives. Check the requirements and prepare for this act of solidarity that transforms the world.

basicRequirements.title: Basic Requirements
basicRequirements.description: To be a donor, you need to meet these fundamental criteria:

age.title: Age
age.description: Be between 16 and 69 years old (minors with authorization).

weight.title: Weight
weight.description: Have a minimum weight of 50kg to ensure safety.

health.title: Health
health.description: Feel well and in good general health.

impediments.title: Impediments to Donation
impediments.description: Know the temporary and permanent impediments for blood donation

temporaries.gripeResfriadoDescription: Wait 7 days after the end of symptoms.
temporaries.gravidezDescription: 90 days after normal birth and 180 days after cesarean section.

definitives.hepatiteDescription: People with a history of hepatitis B or C cannot donate.
definitives.diseasesDescription: Severe diseases such as HIV, hepatitis B or C, cancer, among others.

preparation.title: Preparation for Donation
preparation.description: Follow these steps to ensure a safe and comfortable donation experience

hydration.title: Hydration
hydration.description: Drink plenty of water in the 24 hours before donation

nutrition.title: Nutrition
nutrition.description: Eat a good meal and avoid fatty foods before donation

sleep.title: Good Sleep
sleep.description: Get at least 6 hours of sleep the night before

rest.title: Rest
rest.description: Come well rested and avoid intense physical activity before donation

avoidFats.title: Avoid Fats
avoidFats.description: Avoid fatty foods 3 hours before donation

medications.title: Medications
medications.description: Inform the staff about any medication you are taking

cta.title: Ready to Donate?
cta.description: There are many blood centers spread throughout the city. Choose the nearest one and schedule your appointment online.
